docket_entries.description: FIRST APPEARANCE FOR THE STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT AS TO POSSESSION; FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOUBLE WOOD INVESTMENT, INC., A CA. CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT PHASE TWO STRATEGIES, A CA. CORP.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOUBLE WOOD INVESTMENT, INC., A CA. CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT PHASE TWO STRATEGIES, A CA. CORP. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
